steps.t: Tom has told you that the sword can be found near Old Man Willow. You should work together with Marigold to find the sword and destroy it.
Complete 'Woe of the Willow' on any difficulty. At level 20 or above, use the Instance Finder to enter Woe of the Willow.
Hob Hayward guards the Buckland Gate. You should tell him what has transpired since you last saw him.
